title: OR coefficient and cancellation predicates
summary: Defines rational coefficient systems and expresses the intended OR recurrence as vanishing of every finite obstruction-coefficient sum.

mathematicalContent.heading: Coefficient system
mathematicalContent.body: At fixed total degree N, a coefficient system assigns a rational number to every triple (a,b,c) with a+b+c=N.

mathematicalContent.heading: Defect cancellation
mathematicalContent.body: Given a finite obstruction basis K and word-level rational defects d, cancellation requires the weighted sum to vanish separately for each input slot and basis element.

mathematicalContent.heading: Current recurrence definition
mathematicalContent.body: SatisfiesORRecurrence presently unfolds exactly to SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ; the parameters w₁,w₂,n are retained but not used in the definition.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Stores a rational coefficient on each degree-N OR index.

correspondence.leanType: def coeffR {N : ℕ} (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (I : ORIndex N) : ℝ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Casts a rational coefficient to the real number used by ambient operators.

correspondence.leanType: theorem coeffR_apply {N : ℕ} (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (I : ORIndex N) : C.coeffR I = (C.coeff I : ℝ)
def SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (K : Finset κ) (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines rational defect cancellation slot-by-slot in a finite obstruction basis.

correspondence.leanType: def SatisfiesORRecurrence {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (_w₁ _w₂ _n : ℚ) (K : Finset κ) (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the current OR recurrence predicate to be the same rational cancellation condition.

correspondence.leanType: theorem satisfiesORRecurrence_iff_defectCancellationQ {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (w₁ w₂ n : ℚ) (K : Finset κ) (C : ORCoefficientSystem N) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : SatisfiesORRecurrence w₁ w₂ n K C defectCoeffQ ↔ SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ K C defectCoeffQ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Proves the definitional equivalence between OR recurrence and rational defect cancellation.

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: This module records the target cancellation equations rather than deriving them. The displayed w₁, w₂, and n parameters are currently unused by SatisfiesORRecurrence, and no closed coefficient system is proved here to satisfy the predicate.
